name: Uther
description: A Healer that can negate high bursts of damage.
title: The Lightbringer
info: The first paladin and founder of the Order of the Silver Hand, Uther the Lightbringer is a faithful servant of the Light. Dispensing justice with the swing of his hammer, Uther is a bastion of truth and an unflinching symbol of the Alliance.

Uther.name: Holy Light
Uther.description: Heal target allied Hero for 362 (+4% per level) Health. When used on a target other than Uther, also heal Uther for 181 (+4% per level) Health.

Uther.name: Holy Radiance
Uther.description: Heal all allied Heroes and Minions in a line for 194 (+4% per level) Health, dealing 177 (+4% per level) damage to enemies.

Uther.name: Hammer of Justice
Uther.description: Deal 109 (+4% per level) damage and Stun the target for 1 second.

Uther.name: Divine Shield
Uther.description: Make an allied Hero Invulnerable and increase their Movement Speed by 20% for 3 seconds.

Uther.name: Divine Storm
Uther.description: Deal 170 (+4% per level) damage and Stun nearby enemies for 1.75 seconds.

Uther.name: Devotion
Uther.description: Uther's Basic Abilities grant 25 Armor to allied Heroes, and 15 to Uther, for 2 seconds.  Eternal Vanguard  Upon dying, Uther becomes an Invulnerable spirit for up to 8 seconds. While in spirit form, Uther can heal allies with Flash of Light for 230 (+4% per level).

UtherEternalDevotion.name: Flash of Light
UtherEternalDevotion.description: Heal an ally for 230 (+4% per level) Health.

1.name: Silver Touch
1.description: Quest: Reduce damage from Heroic sources with Devotion.  Reward: After reducing damage 40 times, Holy Light's Mana cost is reduced from 80 to 60.  Reward: After reducing damage 80 times, Holy Light's Mana cost is reduced to 40, and its range is increased by 50%.

1.name: Wave of Light
1.description: Quest: Damage or heal Heroes 60 times with Holy Radiance.  Reward: Increase the duration of Devotion by 0.5 seconds.  Passive: Damaging or healing Heroes with Holy Radiance refunds 5 Mana and reduces its cooldown by 0.75 seconds.

1.name: Hammer of the Lightbringer
1.description: Quest: Basic Attack enemies 75 times.  Reward: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Hammer of Justice by 1.5 seconds.  Passive: Basic Attacks restore 1.5% of Uther's maximum Mana.

4.name: Holy Shock
4.description: Activate to deal 145 (+4% per level) damage to the target enemy, and gain the self-healing benefits of Holy Light. Shares a cooldown with Holy Light.

4.name: Pursuit of Justice
4.description: Hammer of Justice increases Uther's Movement Speed by 25% for 3 seconds.

4.name: Holy Fire
4.description: Deal 13 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes increase this damage by 20% for 3 seconds. This can stack up to 3 times.

7.name: Armor of Faith
7.description: Being Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced grants Uther 90 Mana and causes Holy Light's cooldown to recharge 200% faster for 6 seconds. This effect has a 20 second cooldown.

7.name: Guardian of Ancient Kings
7.description: Healing a Hero with a Basic Ability that is Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced grants them 50 Armor for 3 seconds.

7.name: Hand of Protection
7.description: Activate to make target ally Unstoppable for 1 second. Cannot be cast on Uther. Basic Attacks reduce Hand of Protection's cooldown by 5 seconds.

10.name: Divine Shield
10.description: Make an allied Hero Invulnerable and increase their Movement Speed by 20% for 3 seconds.

10.name: Divine Storm
10.description: Deal 170 (+4% per level) damage and Stun nearby enemies for 1.75 seconds.

13.name: Blessed Champion
13.description: For the next 5 seconds after using Holy Light, Uther's Basic Attacks heal him and nearby allied Heroes for 15% of the total amount healed by Holy Light.

13.name: Well Met
13.description: When used against Heroes, Hammer of Justice reduces the target's Movement Speed and damage dealt by 25% for 3 seconds.

13.name: Spell Shield
13.description: Every 30 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 50%.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.

16.name: Beacon of Light
16.description: Uther receives 125% bonus self-healing when targeting others with Holy Light. This bonus is increased to 250% while he is below 50% Health.

16.name: Tyr's Deliverance
16.description: Increase the damage and healing of Holy Radiance by 10%. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes cause Uther's next cast of Holy Radiance to have its damage and healing increased by an additional 10%, stacking up to 7 times.

16.name: Benediction
16.description: Activate to reduce the Mana cost of Uther's next Basic Ability by 50 and its cooldown by 10 seconds.

20.name: Bulwark of Light
20.description: Divine Shield is also applied to all nearby allied Heroes and lasts 1 second longer.

20.name: Divine Hurricane
20.description: Divine Storm's radius is increased by 50% and its cooldown is reduced by 40 seconds.

20.name: Redemption
20.description: After Eternal Vanguard ends, Uther revives at the spirit's location with 50% of his maximum Health.  This effect has a 180 second cooldown.

20.name: Divine Protection
20.description: Increase Devotion Armor to 50 and its duration by 0.5 seconds.

tooltipMarkup.GenericSpellShieldTalent: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SpellShieldCooldown,Duration"/></c> seconds, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SpellShieldActive,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/></c> Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SpellShieldActive,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds, reducing the damage taken by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SpellShieldActive,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Ability]"/>%</c>.<n/><n/>Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
tooltipMarkup.UtherBeaconOfLight: Uther receives <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HolyLightCreateSelfHealer,MultiplicativeModifierArray[BeaconOfLight].Modifier*100"/>%</c> bonus self-healing when targeting others with Holy Light. This bonus is increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Effect,HolyLightCreateSelfHealer,MultiplicativeModifierArray[BeaconOfLight].Modifier+Effect,HolyLightCreateSelfHealer,MultiplicativeModifierArray[BeaconOfLight].Modifier)*100"/>%</c> while he is below <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Validator,UtherBeaconOfLifeLTThreshold,Value*100"/>%</c> Health.
tooltipMarkup.UtherBenedictionHotbar: Activate to reduce the Mana cost of Uther's next Basic Ability by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d const="$UtherBenedictionManaCostReduction"/></c> and its cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,UtherBenedictionHolyLightCooldownRefund,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.UtherDivineShield: Make an allied Hero Invulnerable and increase their Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,UtherDivineInterventionMovementSpeed,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor *100"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DivineInterventionInvulnerable,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.UtherDivineShieldBulwarkOfLightTalent: Divine Shield is also applied to all nearby allied Heroes and lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,UtherMasteryBulwarkOfLightDivineShield,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/></c> second longer.
tooltipMarkup.UtherDivineStorm: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,DivineStormStunDamage,Amount[0]"/></c> damage and Stun nearby enemies for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,DivineStormStun,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.UtherDivineStormDivineHurricaneTalent: Divine Storm's radius is increased by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Talent,UtherMasteryDivineHurricaneDivineStorm,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value)/(Effect,DivineStormStunSearch,AreaArray[0].Radius)*100" player="0"/>%</c> and its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,UtherMasteryDivineHurricaneDivineStorm,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[4].Value" /></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.UtherEternalDevotion: Uther's Basic Abilities grant <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,UtherEternalDevotionArmor,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus" player="0"/></c> Armor to allied Heroes, and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,UtherEternalDevotionSelfArmor,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus" player="0"/></c> to Uther, for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,UtherEternalDevotionArmor,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><s val="StandardTooltipHeader">Eternal Vanguard</s><n/><n/>Upon dying, Uther becomes an Invulnerable spirit for up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,SpiritOfRedemptionSpiritFormBuff,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds. While in spirit form, Uther can heal allies with Flash of Light for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FlashofLightCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c>.
tooltipMarkup.UtherEternalDevotionArmorOfFaithTalent: Being Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced grants Uther <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,UtherHolyLightArmorOfFaithManaRestoration,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Mana and causes Holy Light's cooldown to recharge <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-(Effect,UtherHolyLightArmorOfFaithModifyUnit,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse/Behavior,UtherHolyLightArmorOfFaithCooldownBuff,Period)*100" precision="3"/>%</c> faster for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,UtherHolyLightArmorOfFaithCooldownBuff,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds. This effect has a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,UtherHolyLightArmorOfFaithCooldownDisplay,Cost[0].Cooldown.TimeUse" player="0"/></c> second cooldown.
tooltipMarkup.UtherEternalDevotionBlessedChampionTalen: For the next <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,UtherBlessedChampion,Duration"/></c> seconds after using Holy Light, Uther's Basic Attacks heal him and nearby allied Heroes for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,UtherBlessedChampionHealRatio,XP*100"/>%</c> of the total amount healed by Holy Light.
tooltipMarkup.UtherEternalDevotionDivineProtectionTale: Increase Devotion Armor to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,UtherEternalDevotionArmor,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus+Talent,UtherEternalDevotionDivineProtection,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value" player="0"/></c> and its duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d const="$UtherDivineProtectionArmorDurationBonus" precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.UtherEternalDevotionGuardianOfAncientKin: Healing a Hero with a Basic Ability that is Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced grants them <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,UtherEternalDevotionGuardianOfAncientKingsArmor,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,UtherEternalDevotionGuardianOfAncientKingsArmor,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.UtherEternalDevotionHammerOfTheLightbrin: Quest: Basic Attack enemies times.Reward: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Hammer of Justice by seconds.Passive: Basic Attacks restore % of Uther's maximum Mana.
tooltipMarkup.UtherFlashofLight: Heal an ally for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,FlashofLightCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Health.
tooltipMarkup.UtherHammerOfJusticePursuitOfJusticeTale: Hammer of Justice increases Uther's Movement Speed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,UtherHammerOfJusticePursuitOfJusticeMovementSpeed,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,UtherHammerOfJusticePursuitOfJusticeMovementSpeed,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.UtherHammerOfJusticeWellMetTalent: When used against Heroes, Hammer of Justice reduces the target's Movement Speed and damage dealt by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,UtherHammerOfJusticeWellMetSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,UtherHammerOfJusticeWellMetSlow,Duration"/></c> seconds.

Basic Attacks reduce Hand of Protection's cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,UtherHandOfProtectionModifyUnit,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.UtherHolyFireTalent: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HolyFireDamage,Amount"/></c> damage per second to nearby enemies. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes increase this damage by<c val="#TooltipNumbers"> 20%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,UtherHolyFireStack,Duration"/></c> seconds. This can stack up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,UtherHolyFireToken,Max"/></c> times.

When used on a target other than Uther, also heal Uther for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HolyLightCreateSelfHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Health.
tooltipMarkup.UtherHolyLightHolyShockTalent: Activate to deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HolyShockDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to the target enemy, and gain the self-healing benefits of Holy Light. Shares a cooldown with Holy Light.
tooltipMarkup.UtherHolyLightSilverTouch: Quest: Reduce damage from Heroic sources with Devotion.Reward: After reducing damage times, Holy Light's Mana cost is reduced from to .Reward: After reducing damage times, Holy Light's Mana cost is reduced to , and its range is increased by %.
tooltipMarkup.UtherHolyRadiance: Heal all allied Heroes and Minions in a line for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HolyRadianceCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Health, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HolyRadianceEnemyDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies.
tooltipMarkup.UtherHolyRadianceTyrsDeliveranceTalent: Increase the damage and healing of Holy Radiance by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,UtherTyrsDeliveranceAccumulator,Offset"/>%</c>. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes cause Uther's next cast of Holy Radiance to have its damage and healing increased by an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,UtherTyrsDeliveranceAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c>, stacking up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,UtherTyrsDeliveranceTokenCounter,Max"/></c> times.
tooltipMarkup.UtherHolyRadianceWaveofLightTalent: Quest: Damage or heal Heroes times with Holy Radiance.Reward: Increase the duration of Devotion by seconds.Passive: Damaging or healing Heroes with Holy Radiance refunds Mana and reduces its cooldown by seconds.
tooltipMarkup.UtherRedemptionTalent: After Eternal Vanguard ends, Uther revives at the spirit's location with <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="1+Effect,RedemptionSetHealth,VitalArray[Life].ChangeFraction*100"/>%</c> of his maximum Health.<n/><n/>This effect has a <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RedemptionCooldown,Duration" player="0"/></c> second cooldown.
